items.title: Single page

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before taking the next step.

items.question: What is SEO and why does my clinic need it?
items.answer: SEO (Search Engine Optimization) is the set of techniques to get your website to appear in Google's top results. For a dental clinic, this means when someone searches 'dentist in your neighborhood,' they find you instead of the competition. Without SEO, your website is invisible.

items.question: What is GEO and how is it different from SEO?
items.answer: GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) is optimization for new AI-powered search engines like Google AI Overview, ChatGPT, or Perplexity. While SEO ranks you in classic Google results, GEO makes AI recommend your clinic when a patient asks 'what's the best dentist near me?'.

items.question: What is Google Business Profile and what is it for?
items.answer: It's Google's free listing that appears in Maps and local results. It's the first thing a patient sees: your address, hours, photos, reviews, and phone number. Having it properly optimized means more calls and more direct visits to your clinic.

items.question: What are Core Web Vitals?
items.answer: They're the metrics Google uses to measure your website's experience: loading speed, visual stability, and response time. If your site is slow or shifts while loading, Google penalizes you and patients leave. Our websites have all indicators in green.

items.question: What is mobile-first design?
items.answer: It means we design your website thinking about mobile first, then adapt it to larger screens. 72% of patients search for a dentist from their phone, so if your site doesn't look perfect on mobile, you're losing patients.

items.question: Do I need to provide content or photos?
items.answer: We adapt. If you have professional photos of your clinic, we use them. If not, we work with high-quality stock imagery and can arrange a photo shoot as an add-on. We write the content based on a brief with you.

items.question: Can I update the website myself afterward?
items.answer: Yes. We give you access to a panel where you can change text, photos, and hours without touching code. For bigger changes, we're just a WhatsApp away.
